question.label: Next-quarter ownership
question.name: You said "owning next quarter" — what's most unclear right now?
question.description: Follows the concrete ownership-clarity thread she just raised and locates the specific uncertainty.

answer: I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.

assessment.note: She answered the ownership-clarity probe with a months-long stuckness signal, implying mild uncertainty about direction and a mildly draining plateau; also reveals an untouched growth concern.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given all that, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Launch leverage
new_queue.name: What do you want this launch to change for you over the next few months?

history.answer_excerpt: I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
